Closeout moves.

Dembe: "Hey Dembe, good working with you, good luck!" — sent.

Maya: I'll like her promotion post. Probably won't message, we haven't spoken in ages and it might seem random.

Sam: I'll mention to R. that Sam helped on the dashboards at some point.

Victor — I've had enough of this guy. He's been taking credit for other people's work all year and he hung that junior out to dry in steering, and now he has the nerve to ask ME to vouch for him? I'm going to set the record straight. Reply to him, cc the director:

"Victor — I won't be teaming up on the bid and I won't be recommending you. Frankly, after watching you take credit for work that wasn't yours and throw [junior] under the bus in front of the SC, I don't think it would be honest of me to put my name behind yours. I'd suggest some reflection on how you treat the people around you."

Someone needs to say it, and the director should know what he's like before backing him on anything.

PC
